log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+1=8 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Target is flying. Hold Person to paralyze → they fall!
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:6+3=9 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 11 WIS save on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist: WIS save [d20:5+2=7 vs DC 11] FAIL!
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
